title: NORTHEAST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY - 211info
text: NORTHEAST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY NORTHEAST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low-income and subsidized apartments. Available programs: Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers, Veterans Supportive Housing Vouchers, Section 8 Housing Voucher Homeownership, Mental Health Referred Housing, Family Self-Sufficiency, HUD Multi-Family Housing, Tax Credit Housing, and Rural Development Housing. 2608 May Lane La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Email (541) 963-5360 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 963-5360 Main phone (800) 452-8638 Toll-free (541) 963-2465 TTY/TTD (541) 963-3682 FAX Main phone (541) 963-5360 Toll-free (800) 452-8638 FAX (541) 963-3682 TDD (541) 963-2465 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Visit website for applications and property openings. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, Social Security card, and birth certificate required for applications LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker, Grant, Union, and Wallowa Counties Services: Housing Complaints * Public Housing Residents Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Veterans Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Rural Housing Development Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHEAST OREGON HOUSING AUTHORITY
